item.summary: Products may potentially be contaminated with Salmonella. Product details: ANGEL branded STRAWBERRY SOFT-SERVE powder; 10- 2-pound bag/case NO UPC.
item.affectedPeople: Product was distributed to direct accounts in California, Utah, New York, Idaho, and New Jersey.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
